eval_results.text: Dark clouds gather on the horizon
The wind picks up and temperature drops
Rain begins to fall heavily
Puddles form on the ground
A rainbow appears as the sun returns
A seed is planted in moist soil
Roots push down and a sprout emerges
Leaves unfold and begin photosynthesis
The stem grows taller toward sunlight
Flowers bloom and attract pollinators
Hunger signals arise from the stomach
The brain decides to search for food
Hands reach out and grasp an apple
Teeth bite and jaw muscles chew
Nutrients absorb and hunger subsides
The heart beats once with a strong pulse
A brief pause follows the heartbeat
The heart beats again with a strong pulse
A brief pause follows the heartbeat
The heart beats once more completing the cycle
Breathe in slowly filling the lungs with air
Hold the breath for a moment of stillness
Breathe out slowly releasing the air
Breathe in slowly filling the lungs with air
Breathe out slowly releasing the air
Day breaks with warm golden sunlight
Noon arrives with the sun directly overhead
Evening comes as shadows grow long
Night falls and stars appear in darkness
Day breaks again with warm golden sunlight
A ball is released from the top of a hill
It accelerates slowly gaining speed downward
Halfway down it moves at moderate velocity
Near the bottom it reaches maximum speed
It rolls onto flat ground and gradually decelerates
Water is heated from room temperature
Small bubbles form on the bottom of the pot
The water begins to simmer with rising bubbles
A rolling boil develops with vigorous motion
Steam rises rapidly as water evaporates
A pendulum is pulled to the right and released
It swings left through the center point
It reaches maximum height on the left side
It swings right back through the center
It returns near its starting position slightly lower
A child wakes up excited on a snowy morning
She puts on warm boots and a thick coat
She steps outside and feels cold air on her face
She builds a snowman with a carrot nose
She goes inside for hot chocolate feeling happy
A bird discovers a good spot to build a nest
It gathers twigs and grass carrying them one by one
The nest takes shape over several days of work
Eggs are laid carefully in the soft center
Baby birds hatch and the parent feeds them
One two three four five six seven
Eight nine ten eleven twelve thirteen
Monday Tuesday Wednesday Thursday
Friday Saturday Sunday then Monday again
January February March April May June
Spring brings new growth and warming days
Summer follows with heat and long daylight
Autumn arrives bringing cool air and falling leaves
Winter comes with cold and shorter days
Spring returns again completing the yearly cycle
An ice cube sits in a warm room unchanged
The edges begin to soften and glisten with moisture
A pool of water forms around the shrinking cube
Only a small sliver of ice remains floating
The ice is completely gone leaving only water
A caterpillar crawls slowly along a branch
It spins silk and forms a chrysalis around itself
Inside the chrysalis transformation occurs over days
The chrysalis cracks open revealing folded wings
A butterfly emerges and flies away on new wings
A loud sudden noise echoes through the room
The body startles with a rapid heartbeat increase
Eyes scan the environment searching for the source
The source is identified as a dropped book
Heart rate returns to normal as calm is restored
A bright flash of lightning illuminates the sky
Thunder follows after a short delay
Another flash appears closer than before
Thunder arrives more quickly this time
The storm moves directly overhead with simultaneous flash and boom
